summary: Iteration 96 testing complete. All 3 fixes verified: 1) CS Kanban shows 5 stages only (New Student, Activated, Satisfactory Call, Pitched Upgrade, Upgraded) with real counts (872 for New Student, NOT capped at 200), per-column pagination, and Kanban/Table toggle. 2) Claret Chat Widget positioned at bottom-LEFT (x=24px). 3) HR shift_id persistence working - EmployeeResponse model includes shift_id field, PUT/GET operations persist correctly. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified all 3 fixes: 1) CS Kanban at /cs shows 5 stages: New Student (872), Activated (45), Satisfactory Call (1), Pitched Upgrade (0), Upgraded (228). Removed stages 'in_progress', 'interested', 'not_interested' are NOT shown as columns. Real counts displayed (not capped at 200). Per-column pagination with 4 pagination buttons found. Kanban/Table toggle works. 2) Claret Chat Widget at bottom-LEFT (x=24px, left-6 in Tailwind). 3) HR shift_id persistence: EmployeeResponse model has shift_id at line 18096 in server.py. PUT /api/hr/employees/{id}/shift saves shift_id, GET returns it correctly. All 5 Kanban columns fit on 1920px viewport without horizontal scroll.

cs_kanban_5_stages.details: CS Kanban shows only 5 stages: new_student (872), activated (45), satisfactory_call (1), pitched_for_upgrade (0), upgraded (228). Removed stages in_progress, interested, not_interested are NOT displayed as columns.

cs_kanban_real_counts.details: New Student column shows 872 students (NOT capped at 200). Summary bar shows real totals: 872, 45, 1, 0, 128, Total: 1048.

cs_kanban_table_toggle.details: Kanban/Table toggle buttons found with data-testid='cs-kanban-toggle' and 'cs-table-toggle'. Both views work correctly.

cs_kanban_per_column_pagination.details: Per-column pagination exists with 4 pagination buttons found. Each column fetches data independently with COLUMN_PAGE_SIZE=50.

cs_kanban_no_horizontal_scroll.details: All 5 columns fit on 1920px viewport. Body scroll width = client width = 1920px.

claret_chat_bottom_left.details: Claret chat widget button positioned at x=24, y=1000 (bottom-left corner). Changed from right-6 to left-6 in ClaretChatWidget.jsx lines 131, 143.

hr_shift_id_persistence.details: EmployeeResponse model includes shift_id (line 18096) and country (line 18097). PUT /api/hr/employees/{id}/shift saves shift_id. GET returns shift_id correctly. Tested with shift change: morning -> afternoon -> morning.

backend_api_tests.details: 15/15 pytest tests passed: auth (2), stage-summary (2), pagination (3), shifts (4), claret (2), cs_head access (2).
